scenes.title: DзянЯнь

location.name: A hidden
location.description: secure basement room with a bed and a phone

scenes.intent: DзянЯнь decides not to risk immediate danger but to spend the month preparing for survival, gathering resources, and planning against the approaching apocalypse
scenes.conflict: The risk of the body being discovered in a civilized society and the fear that instant death would be too easy a punishment for the criminals
scenes.state: She is calm and calculating, quickly formulating a revenge plan while pretending to sleep
scenes.outcome: She lies on the bed pretending to sleep, waiting for the arrival of the criminals Сон Демина and Джан Кая

scenes.title: Сон Демина, Джан Кай
scenes.action: 4-5 sentences

location.name: The basement room where DзянЯнь is pretending to sleep

scenes.intent: Сон Демина and Джан Кай enter the room to steal the jade bracelet and DзянЯнь's assets, with Сон Демина offering to hold the bracelet while Джан Кай cuts it off
scenes.conflict: An invisible vine suddenly appears from the void, striking the men and binding their limbs instantly
scenes.state: Сон Демина is terrified and loses control of his bladder, while Джан Кай is shocked by the real-life carnivorous plant
scenes.relation: They are accomplices who turn into victims of the trap
scenes.outcome: Both men are immobilized by the vines, fall to the floor, and are subsequently killed by Сон Демина using the pliers

scenes.title: Сон Демина
scenes.action: 4-5 sentences

location.name: The basement floor
location.description: amidst the bodies of the criminals

scenes.intent: Сон Демина, realizing the danger of the plant, grabs the pliers to kill Джан Кай in self-defense
scenes.conflict: The sheer horror of the giant carnivorous flower with a bloody tongue and the immediate threat of being eaten
scenes.state: He transitions from terror to aggression, driven by survival instinct
scenes.relation: He attacks his partner Джан Кай
scenes.outcome: Сон Демина kills Джан Кай, leaving two mutilated corpses on the floor, while DзянЯнь remains on the bed suppressing her disgust

scenes.title: DзянЯнь
scenes.action: 4-5 sentences
scenes.intent: After the drug wears off, she stands up, wraps her hand in a sheet, takes the phone, and calls the police to report the crime
scenes.conflict: The physical toll of the ordeal and the need to hide the truth about the apocalypse from the authorities
scenes.state: She appears exhausted after five hours of police interrogation and processing
scenes.outcome: The police return her stolen items, revealing that Сон Демина and Джан Кай had burned the backpack in the past life, but this time it was saved

scenes.title: DзянЯнь
scenes.action: 4-5 sentences
scenes.intent: She leaves the police station to return home and prepare for the apocalypse, knowing she has only three months left
scenes.conflict: The need to convert assets to cash without public knowledge and the risk of media exposure if the secret of the disappearance is revealed
scenes.state: She feels a mix of relief at having avenged her mother and anxiety about the approaching deadline
scenes.outcome: She takes a taxi home, orders food delivery, and enters her house, fully aware that the public narrative of her mother's death and her own disappearance complicates her survival plans

scenes.title: Dзян Янь
scenes.intent: Дзян Янь wants to continue preparations for survival after her mother's death and the secret disappearance of a woman
scenes.conflict: Police secrecy complicates her plans to convert assets to cash and prepare for apocalypse
scenes.state: Cautious, relieved, tired, determined
scenes.outcome: She receives food, checks the lock, and reflects on her mother's death and the need for survival preparation.

scenes.title: Dзян Янь

scenes.conflict: She has no appetite but forces herself to eat
scenes.state: Reflective, slightly melancholic, hungry
scenes.outcome: She receives the food, thanks the delivery boy, and prepares to eat.

scenes.title: Dзян Янь
scenes.intent: Дзян Янь wants to wash away fatigue and dirt before eating
scenes.conflict: None
scenes.state: Refreshed, calm
scenes.outcome: She takes a shower, eats quickly, and decides to manage her 30 billion yuan assets for survival.

scenes.title: Dзян Янь
scenes.intent: Дзян Янь wants to plan how to use her money for survival against heat, rain, floods, and landslides
scenes.conflict: Her current house is too low and unsuitable for the coming disasters
scenes.state: Analytical, worried, determined
scenes.outcome: She decides to sell her houses and cars to buy a wheelhouse and prepare for the first wave of disasters.

scenes.title: Dзян Янь

scenes.outcome: She touches her jade bracelet and wishes for a magical storage space.

scenes.conflict: She doubts it is real and fears it is a hallucination
scenes.state: Surprised, skeptical, excited
scenes.outcome: The bracelet glows brightly, and she realizes it is not a dream.

scenes.title: Dзян Янь
scenes.intent: Дзян Янь wants to explore her new magical space
scenes.conflict: None

scenes.title: Dзян Янь

scenes.conflict: None
scenes.state: Curious, comfortable
scenes.outcome: She steps into the white zone, feels the ideal temperature, and notices the gray zone with a vortex.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: The protagonist stands in a room observing a semi-transparent vortex near a grey zone that resembles a black hole from sci-fi films, with a glowing "0%" inscription above it.

location.name: A mysterious space adjacent to a grey zone and a black portal
location.description: transitioning to a standard office room

scenes.intent: She intends to test the nature of the vortex by entering and exiting the space to understand its mechanics and verify her hypothesis about its origin based on her reading experience.
scenes.conflict: The unknown nature of the vortex and the need to safely interact with it without physical harm or getting stuck.
scenes.state: Curious, confident, and analytical, feeling a sense of wonder at the potential discovery.
scenes.outcome: She successfully enters and exits the space with a thought command, confirming the portal's functionality and ease of use.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: The protagonist mentally commands the computer, desk, and bookshelf to be collected, causing all furniture to vanish instantly and appear in the grey zone where items are automatically sorted.

location.name: The office room and the grey storage zone

scenes.intent: She wants to test the storage capabilities of the grey zone by moving large objects into it to see how the sorting mechanism works.
scenes.conflict: The potential for the sorting system to malfunction or the items to be lost in the grey zone.
scenes.state: Surprised and amazed by the smoothness and efficiency of the teleportation and sorting process.
scenes.outcome: The furniture is successfully teleported and sorted in the grey zone, leaving the "0%" inscription unchanged, confirming the storage system's reliability.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: After several experiments, the protagonist deduces that objects must touch her body to enter the space, that connected objects can be moved via one point of contact, and that the grey zone automatically sorts items unless manually organized.

location.name: The grey storage zone and the office room

scenes.intent: She aims to fully understand the rules governing the space to maximize its utility for storage and resource gathering.
scenes.conflict: The need to establish clear rules for interaction to avoid mistakes or inefficiencies in using the space.
scenes.state: Satisfied and intellectually stimulated by the logical conclusions she has drawn from her experiments.
scenes.outcome: She concludes that the grey zone is perfect for compressed storage, significantly increasing capacity, and realizes the potential for buying and storing vast amounts of resources.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: The protagonist considers the fertility of the black land and recalls a past incident where her lawn remained green due to an automatic irrigation system while her indoor rose withered from lack of water.

location.name: Her mind
location.description: recalling past events and the current space

scenes.intent: She plans to test the black land's fertility by planting the withered rose to see if it can recover and grow fresh produce even during a future catastrophe.
scenes.conflict: The uncertainty of whether the black land can truly support life and revive dead plants.
scenes.state: Hopeful and determined, driven by the need for food security in a crisis.
scenes.outcome: She decides that if the black land is fertile, it is suitable for planting, and resolves to use the space for growing fresh fruits and vegetables.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: The protagonist finds a garden trowel, teleports the withered rose into the space, retrieves vanilla ice cream and a glass of hot water from the refrigerator, and places them in the grey zone before planting the rose in the black soil.

location.name: The office room
location.description: the grey storage zone, and the black planting zone

scenes.intent: She wants to test the regenerative properties of the black soil by planting the dead rose and preserving perishable food items simultaneously.
scenes.conflict: The challenge of managing multiple tasks—planting and storing food—within the same timeframe and space.
scenes.state: Focused and eager to see the results of her planting experiment.
scenes.outcome: The rose instantly revives with green leaves and new shoots, confirming the black land's fertility, while the ice cream and water remain unchanged in temperature and state.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: The protagonist observes the revived rose and the preserved food, realizing that time is stopped in the space, and concludes that the three zones (black for planting, white for living, grey for storage) function perfectly.
scenes.intent: She aims to confirm the distinct functions of each zone and plan a massive resource acquisition strategy given her financial means and infinite storage.
scenes.conflict: The temptation to immediately spend her money on resources versus the need to verify the system's limits first.
scenes.state: Ecstatic and triumphant, feeling a surge of joy at the discovery of the space's full potential.
scenes.outcome: She celebrates the perfect functionality of the three zones and looks forward to a crazy shopping spree for resources.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: A phone rings at the door, forcing the protagonist to exit the space, where she sees a curly-haired man in a press vest with a camera and a large bouquet of white chrysanthemums on the security monitor.
scenes.intent: She wants to identify the intruder and determine his intentions before deciding how to respond to his presence.
scenes.conflict: The intrusion of an unknown person into her secure residence and the threat of him exposing her private food deliveries online.
scenes.state: Alert and suspicious, maintaining a cold demeanor despite the unexpected visitor.
scenes.relation: Antagonistic, with the man trying to gain access and the woman defending her privacy.
scenes.outcome: The man claims to be a new neighbor and a journalist, threatening to publish photos of her food deliveries if she doesn't open the door.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: The protagonist calls the residential complex security service while the man continues to speak through the camera, then decides to call the police instead of paying him off, as she is no longer afraid.
scenes.intent: She aims to handle the situation legally and protect her privacy by involving authorities rather than negotiating with a threatening individual.
scenes.conflict: The man's persistence in trying to enter and his threats to expose her private life to the public.
scenes.state: Resolute and unafraid, showing a shift from potential fear to confident defiance.
scenes.relation: Hostile, with the man escalating his threats and the woman preparing to counter them.
scenes.outcome: The man continues to shout at the door, preparing to make another attempt to enter.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: The door opens to reveal the protagonist in black sportswear with a smudge and a baseball cap, standing with a cold aura, while the man approaches with a forced smile and the bouquet of chrysanthemums.
scenes.intent: She wants to confront the man directly, demand his credentials, and assert her authority over the situation without yielding to his pressure.
scenes.conflict: The man's attempt to charm her with flowers and claims of being a journalist versus her demand for proof of his identity.
scenes.state: Cold, authoritative, and unimpressed by his attempts to manipulate her emotions.

outfits.Дзян Янь: Black sportswear with a smudge and a baseball cap

scenes.relation: Confrontational, with the man trying to gain favor and the woman maintaining a strict boundary.
scenes.outcome: She coldly questions him and refuses the flowers, demanding to see his identification.

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: The protagonist demands the man's identification, and he attempts to open his red wallet from his pocket, but she quickly snatches the document from him before he can reveal it.
scenes.intent: She aims to verify his identity immediately and prevent him from using any false credentials to gain her trust or access.
scenes.conflict: The man's attempt to hide or delay showing his ID versus her swift action to seize the document.
scenes.state: Quick, decisive, and protective of her privacy and security.
scenes.relation: Tense, with the man trying to control the narrative and the woman taking control of the interaction.
scenes.outcome: She successfully intercepts his document, preventing him from showing a potentially fake or misleading ID, and maintaining her upper hand in the confrontation.

scenes.outcome: She organizes the shelves and decides to move her peacock-like chair and living room into the space later.

scenes.title: Dзянь Янь

location.name: Magical storage space
location.description: specifically the living area with a peacock-like chair

scenes.conflict: She faces aggressive online comments calling her a "star of disasters" and accusing her of bringing misfortune to her parents, which she ignores to avoid drawing more attention.
scenes.state: Indifferent to online trolls, she accepts the chaos of the approaching apocalypse and focuses on her survival strategy.
scenes.outcome: She scrolls through comments about her being a valuable bride or a disaster star, dismisses them, and exits the social media feed.

scenes.title: Dзянь Янь

location.name: Magical storage space

scenes.conflict: Her purchase limit is exhausted, yet she finds a way to acquire necessary disguises to maintain her anonymity.
scenes.state: Cautious and strategic, she prioritizes adaptation and risk avoidance over comfort or convenience.
scenes.outcome: She spends two hours in the space, then returns to the real world, resolving not to depend on the space for her entire life.

scenes.title: Dзянь Янь

scenes.intent: She aims to adapt to a world that will soon change and ensure her survival by maintaining flexibility and not relying solely on her magical space.
scenes.conflict: The uncertainty of whether the space will remain with her fuels her anxiety and drives her need for contingency plans.
scenes.state: Anxious yet prepared, she values self-reliance and the ability to adapt to extreme circumstances.
scenes.outcome: She accepts the limitations of her current situation and prepares for the next day's mission.

scenes.state: Calm and composed, she remains unmoved by the shock of others and quickly addresses the situation.
scenes.relation: Du Citen is surprised and confused by her sudden change in status and attire, while Dзянь Янь is indifferent.
scenes.outcome: Du Citen quickly recovers, confirms the area is suitable, and points out the residential complex details.

scenes.conflict: Дузытен feels internal conflict between his desire to ask about her financial situation and his fear of offending her or revealing his own agency's connection to her family.
scenes.state: Дузытен feels anxious and hesitant, worrying about Dзяньянь's financial troubles and her sudden rush to sell her villa.
scenes.relation: Дузытен becomes more concerned and protective of Dзяньянь, realizing her financial desperation.
scenes.outcome: Дузытен admits the apartment in Building A has a troubled history and agrees to help sell Dзяньянь's old properties quickly to bridge the gap in her down payment.

scenes.title: Дзяньянь
scenes.action: Dзяньянь reveals her urgent need to sell her villa and buy a penthouse, prompting Дузытен to ask if she has encountered a problem or needs financial help.

location.name: Inside the complex grounds
location.description: near the path to Building A.

scenes.intent: Dзяньянь wants to secure a penthouse quickly before the predicted apocalypse in three months and needs to liquidate her assets immediately.
scenes.conflict: Дузытен struggles to understand why she is rushing so much and worries she might be facing a crisis similar to the wealthy heiress trope in dramas.
scenes.state: Dзяньянь remains calm and smiling despite her urgency, while Дузытен feels a surge of anxiety and a desire to offer his own savings.
scenes.relation: Дузытен expresses his willingness to help financially, though he downplays his own resources, while Dзяньянь reassures him of her trust in him.
scenes.outcome: Дузытен agrees to help and Dзяньянь confirms she trusts him, leading to a moment of shared vulnerability where she mentions her father's illness and the family's support.

scenes.title: Дзяньянь
scenes.action: Dзяньянь delivers a serious warning to Дузытен about a prophecy stating the world will end in three months and urges him to stock up on supplies.

location.name: The grounds of the Chang Shui Wan complex
location.description: likely near a vehicle or stopping point.

scenes.intent: Dзяньянь aims to prepare Дузытен for the impending apocalypse by convincing him to gather food, medicine, and other necessities.
scenes.conflict: Дузытен is skeptical and confused by the prophecy, viewing it as a sign of mental instability caused by the death of her friend Лиджун, and tries to change the subject.
scenes.state: Dзяньянь is serious and determined, while Дузытен feels a mix of disbelief, pity, and a desire to avoid upsetting her further.
scenes.relation: Дузытен shifts from concern to a protective, almost pitying stance, deciding not to challenge her directly but to agree to her requests to keep the peace.
scenes.outcome: Дузытен agrees to stock up on supplies like masks and ibuprofen, and Dзяньянь insists he listen to her seriously, marking a shift in their dynamic towards shared survival preparation.

scenes.title: Дзяньянь
scenes.action: Dзяньянь and Дузытен arrive at Building E of the Qing Shui Wan complex, which is shaped like a pyramid with Building A at the very top.

location.name: The entrance to Building E of the Qing Shui Wan complex
location.description: a pyramid-shaped structure with a moving truck outside.

scenes.intent: Dзяньянь wants to proceed with the move-in process and finalize the transaction for the penthouse.
scenes.conflict: The scene is interrupted by the presence of a young woman in black with a small boy, creating a tense atmosphere as they approach the building.
scenes.state: Dзяньянь feels a sudden surge of anger upon seeing the woman, while Дузытен observes the scene with curiosity and caution.
props: leather furniture being carried by workers
scenes.relation: Dзяньянь's anger towards the woman is immediate and intense, contrasting with Дузытен's observational stance.
scenes.outcome: The arrival at the building reveals a moving truck and workers carrying leather furniture, setting the stage for a confrontation with the woman in black.

scenes.title: Дзяньянь
scenes.action: Dзяньянь identifies the woman in black with the child as Джан Цици, the mistress of her uncle Суньдемин, and feels a surge of rage upon seeing her.

location.name: The entrance to Building E of the Qing Shui Wan complex.

scenes.intent: Dзяньянь wants to confront Джан Цици and express her anger over the woman's presence and connection to her family.
scenes.conflict: The emotional weight of seeing her uncle's mistress, who is also the mother of her child, creates a complex emotional conflict for Dзяньянь.
scenes.state: Dзяньянь is filled with rage and shock, while Джан Цици appears distressed with red eyes and mourning ribbons on her hands.
scenes.relation: Dзяньянь feels a strong emotional connection and anger towards Джан Цици, viewing her as a threat or a painful reminder of her past.
scenes.outcome: The scene ends with Dзяньянь's intense emotional reaction to seeing Джан Цици, setting up a potential confrontation or emotional climax.

outfits.Dзяньянь: face hidden under a mask and hat

outfits.Dзяньянь: face hidden under a mask and hat

scenes.conflict: Dзяньянь refuses the offer to stay at Дудзен's home, citing her hotel reservation at Intercontinental as a reason to avoid social interaction.

scenes.title: Dзяньянь
scenes.action: Dзяньянь decides to fight back against her tormentors instead of hiding, realizing that showing weakness will only invite further bullying. She resolves to put everyone in their place permanently, specifically targeting the aggressive neighbor Джан Цицы who deserves special attention for her own bullying behavior. She checks her surroundings to ensure no one is nearby before proceeding with her plan. She retrieves a powerful German-made lithium chainsaw from her spatial storage unit, which weighs about 8kg and features a massive 15-meter blade. She activates the chainsaw by pressing the start button, causing the blade to spin with a screaming noise and a deep hum. She whispers to herself that this is exactly what she needs and forms a cunning smile on her lips. Holding the chainsaw, she begins to walk up the stairs toward the target apartment.|Dзяньянь|Dзяньянь's apartment hallway, a quiet space where she has confirmed no one is present to witness her preparations.
scenes.intent: Dзяньянь intends to confront her bullies and specifically punish Джан Цицы to stop the harassment once and for all. She wants to use the powerful chainsaw as a tool of intimidation and defense to ensure her safety and dominance in the future. She plans to ascend the stairs to the target floor to execute her counter-attack without hesitation or fear. She aims to demonstrate that she is not a victim who can be pushed around anymore. She seeks to establish a new order where her neighbors respect her boundaries.
scenes.conflict: The physical act of climbing the stairs with a heavy 8kg chainsaw requires significant effort and noise that could attract unwanted attention. The risk of being caught before she reaches the target floor is high, as the building is active with other residents. Her aggressive stance might escalate the situation beyond a simple confrontation if the bullies are already armed or prepared. The presence of the "bloody mosquitoes" approaching at half-past five adds a ticking clock to her mission, forcing her to move quickly before the environment becomes hostile to anyone outside. She must balance her desire for revenge with the practical danger of the weapon and the timing of the insect attack.
scenes.state: Dзяньянь feels determined and resolute, having made up her mind to stop the bullying immediately. She is confident in her ability to handle the situation with the chainsaw, masking her fear with a calculated and cunning demeanor. Her emotional state shifts from passive victimhood to active aggression, fueled by the need to protect her dignity and safety. She feels a surge of satisfaction upon activating the weapon, believing it gives her the upper hand. Her resolve is hardened by the realization that hiding is no longer an option.

scenes.conflict: На пути ей попадаются люди с тазами и тонкими одеялами, их лица красные от жары, дыхание тяжёлое, они молча кивают и показывают большой палец, удивляясь её громоздкой экипировке
scenes.state: Уставшая, но физически подготовленная благодаря нескольким дням в укрытии
scenes.relation: Молчаливое взаимодействие с людьми на лестнице
scenes.outcome: Дзян Янь достигает первого этажа за полчаса, когда уже начинают летать мутантные кровососущие комары

scenes.title: Дзян Янь

scenes.state: Бдительная, осознающая опасность комаров и отсутствие пищи для них
scenes.outcome: Дзян Янь открывает дверь и быстрым шагом направляется к выходу, чувствуя раскалённый воздух

scenes.state: Озадаченная, но продолжающая движение
scenes.outcome: Дзян Янь замечает, что это не асфальт, и продолжает путь, чувствуя липкость поверхности под ногами

scenes.state: Ужасающаяся, но вынужденная продолжать путь
scenes.outcome: Запах разложения и нечистот пробивается сквозь изоляционную экипировку, Дзян Янь подходит к воротам комплекса

scenes.state: Cold and calculating, she remains unaffected by the horror of her words while others are stunned.

scenes.relation: The group is shocked by her casual suggestion of murder, and Лю Дахун feels his eyelids twitching in fear or anger.
scenes.outcome: The group is thrown into shock by her proposal, and Лю Дахун questions the specifics of her plan while trying to maintain composure.

scenes.title: Лю Дахун, Dжан Цица, Dжан Цими
scenes.action: Лю Дахун inspects the window to ensure no one is outside before questioning Dжан Цица about her plan.
scenes.intent: Лю Дахун seeks clarification on who she wants to kill and how she plans to use the stolen knives.
scenes.conflict: Dжан Цица reveals a message from Dзян Янь to the main manager, showing that she intends to involve Dзян Янь in the plot.
scenes.state: Лю Дахун is suspicious and wary, while Dжан Цица remains calm and confident in her plan.
scenes.relation: Dжан Цими becomes cautious of Dжан Цица's wealth and influence, while Лю Дахун tries to understand the situation.
scenes.outcome: Dжан Цица explains that they will use the guards' knives to deal with those who are unlucky, and the group realizes the gravity of her intentions.

scenes.intent: Dжан Цими tries to dissuade Dжан Цица from involving Dзян Янь, reminding her of her earlier desire to get closer to Dзян Янь.
scenes.conflict: Dжан Цица remains silent and smiles coldly, while Dжан Цими feels a shift in his attitude towards her due to her wealth and power.
scenes.state: Dжан Цими is confused and cautious, while Dжан Цица is firm and unyielding in her resolve.
scenes.relation: Dжан Цими warns Dжан Цица not to get involved with her, while Dжан Цица dismisses his concerns and justifies her actions.
scenes.outcome: Dжан Цица argues that times have changed and that resources are more important than money, leading Dжан Цими to consider the possibility of a catastrophic end due to the heat.

scenes.title: Лю Дахун, Dжан Цица
scenes.action: Лю Дахун questions Dжан Цица about her plan to use "bloody mosquitoes" to destroy part of the residents.
scenes.intent: Лю Дахун seeks further clarification on her plan to lure people inside the complex with monsters.
scenes.conflict: Dжан Цица confirms her plan to open the doors and let the monsters in, creating a new threat to the residents.
scenes.state: Лю Дахун is concerned and confused, while Dжан Цица remains calm and confident in her plan.
scenes.relation: Лю Дахун is wary of her plan, while Dжан Цица explains her reasoning and justifies her actions.
scenes.outcome: The group begins to plan how to lure the monsters inside the complex, setting the stage for a potential massacre of the residents.

scenes.title: Людахун, Джан Цици
scenes.action: Людахун, не выдержав разговора, обращается к Джан Цици с вопросом о значении предложения использовать кровососущих комаров для уничтожения жильцов. Джан Цици с лёгкой усмешкой уточняет, не имел ли он в виду открытие дверей для заманивания монстров внутрь дома, тем самым начав планирование вторжения. Людахун молчит с непроницаемым взглядом, создавая напряжение в группе. Его сдержанное заявление о том, что уменьшение числа людей облегчит управление и сэкономит ресурсы, шокирует остальных сотрудников. Все взгляды переключаются на него с недоумением и опаской, пытаясь понять скрытый смысл его слов.

scenes.title: Людахун, Джан Цици, сотрудники
scenes.action: После паузы, наполненной тревогой, кто-то из присутствующих спрашивает, как уменьшение людей может облегчить управление. Людахун, игнорируя растерянные лица, объясняет, что меньше людей требуют меньше ресурсов, но предупреждает, что последствия могут быть непростыми. В воздухе повисла атмосфера страха, когда взгляды с опаской переходили от одного человека к другому, ожидая ответа. Джан Цици с холодной улыбкой обращается к остальным, заявляя, что после сегодняшнего дня всё изменится и они будут управлять теми, кто останется. Она утверждает, что кто-то будет платить за нежелание понимать, а остальные будут лишь наблюдать.

scenes.title: Людахун, Джан Цици, Джанцимин
scenes.action: Джан Цици признаёт прозорливость Людахуна, напоминая, что ресурсы хватит максимум на три дня, после чего временные укрытия превратятся в хаос. Она предупреждает, что те, кто контактирует с официальными органами, станут объектом подозрений и обвинений в краже ресурсов. Джанцимин чувствует волну тревоги, но последнее замечание пробуждает в нём амбиции и стремление к власти. Он соглашается, что при уменьшении количества людей можно сэкономить ресурсы и контролировать всё, включая Шеньшуйвань. Джан Цици усмехается про себя, видя в Людахуне человека без принципов, готового менять убеждения ради власти и ресурсов.

scenes.title: Людахун, сотрудники
scenes.action: Некоторые управляющие с надеждой обращаются к Людахуну, предлагая перейти на сторону правителей. Людахун, взяв незажённую сигарету в рот и глубоко вдохнув, размышляет несколько секунд. Он холодно оглядывает всех и соглашается на план, но выдвигает два важных условия. Он требует, чтобы этот план знали только они, а сотрудники на местах и те, кто связан с жильцами, должны молчать. Действовать разрешается только после того, как официальные поставки уйдут, и главное условие — их не должны поймать.

scenes.title: Дзяньян
scenes.action: Дзяньян выходит за пределы жилого комплекса и скрывается в одном из уединённых уголков, где снимает рюкзак с запасами. Она достаёт два полностью заряженных электрофумигатора, купленных ранее в интернете, рассчитывая на обычных комаров. Хотя она взяла всего около десяти штук, она решает идти дальше, не зная, смогут ли они убить мутировавших монстров. Она быстро направляется в сторону ближайшего торгового центра, наблюдая за пустыми улицами, где не видно живых людей.

scenes.title: Дзяньян
scenes.action: Взгляд Дзяньяна скользит по пустым улицам, где она замечает обгоревшие и покопчённые корпуса автомобилей и зданий, пострадавшие от пожаров. На улицах и тротуарах разбросаны останки животных и людей, чьи сушёные трупы поглощены жаром. Везде лежит слой чёрной пыли, то ли дорожной, то ли от сожжённых тел. Дзяньян замечает стукивающие звуки, как будто труп был сброшен с высоты, и к нему быстро подлетает стая кровожадных комаров, обрушившаяся на тело с невероятной скоростью.

scenes.conflict: Волна удушающего жара
scenes.state: Усталость, но решимость
scenes.outcome: Дзяньянь успешно возвращается в реальный мир, несмотря на жару

scenes.title: Дзяньянь
scenes.action: Дзяньянь заканчивает ужин и проверяет телефон, обнаружив восстановление связи

location.name: Убежище
location.description: затем реальный мир дома в Циншуйване, затем снова в убежище

scenes.intent: Дзяньянь хочет вернуться в реальный мир, чтобы проверить обстановку, но сталкивается с удушающей жарой
scenes.conflict: Высокая температура и необходимость экономить энергию мешают комфортному пребыванию в доме
scenes.state: Дзяньянь чувствует облегчение от связи, но затем испытывает физический дискомфорт от жары
scenes.outcome: Дзяньянь возвращается в убежище, чтобы проверить чат жильцов, где обсуждают условия жизни

scenes.title: Жители комплекса
scenes.action: Обсуждение в чате владельцев жилья в Циншуйване после ужаса
scenes.intent: Люди пытаются отвлечься, обмениваясь фото и видео из подземного убежища
scenes.conflict: Конфликты из-за отказа делиться припасами и жалобы на условия жизни
scenes.state: Люди выглядят измождёнными, на лбах выступил пот, лица пылают от жары
scenes.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за распределения ресурсов
scenes.outcome: Люди обсуждают работу кондиционеров и их неэффективность из-за высокой температуры

scenes.title: Сотрудники ЖКХ
scenes.action: Установка кондиционеров в подземном убежище
scenes.intent: Сотрудники ЖКХ устанавливают кондиционеры для охлаждения помещений
scenes.conflict: Стандартные бытовые модели не справляются с охлаждением из-за высокой температуры и большого количества людей
scenes.state: Люди выглядят измождёнными, несмотря на работу кондиционеров
scenes.relation: Сотрудников ЖКХ критикуют за неэффективность работы кондиционеров
scenes.outcome: Люди понимают, что условия в подземном убежище лучше, чем в квартирах, но всё ещё невыносимы

scenes.title: Жители комплекса
scenes.action: Обсуждение проникновения кровососущих монстров в убежище
scenes.intent: Люди пытаются понять, почему кровососущие монстры проникли в убежище
scenes.conflict: Кровососущие монстры проникли через пешеходный проход, оставив следы крови на стенах
scenes.state: Люди испытывают страх и гнев из-за проникновения монстров
scenes.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за неизвестных виновников
scenes.outcome: Люди проклинают неизвестных виновников проникновения монстров

scenes.title: Жители комплекса
scenes.action: Обсуждение импровизированного крематория в парковочном пространстве
scenes.intent: Люди пытаются понять, почему в парковочном пространстве возник огонь
scenes.conflict: Огонь и дым в парковочном пространстве, где лежат тела погибших
scenes.state: Люди испытывают ужас и отчаяние из-за количества погибших
scenes.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за потери близких
scenes.outcome: Люди понимают, что работники ЖКХ не успевают транспортировать тела за пределы комплекса

scenes.title: Жители комплекса
scenes.action: Обсуждение видеоролика с импровизированного убежища в паркинге
scenes.intent: Люди пытаются найти утешение и поддержку в трудных условиях
scenes.conflict: Люди сидят, лежат на полу, некоторые пытаются заснуть, другие играют в карты
scenes.state: Люди испытывают отчаяние и усталость из-за потери близких
scenes.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за потери близких
scenes.outcome: Люди понимают, что мечтать о тишине и покое бессмысленно, но никто не курил

scenes.title: Дзяньянь
scenes.action: Дзяньянь анализирует численность участников чата и замечает пропажу людей
scenes.intent: Дзяньянь хочет понять, почему количество участников чата резко уменьшилось
scenes.conflict: Пропажа почти 200 семей за один день, что означает гибель не менее 600 человек
scenes.state: Дзяньянь испытывает тревогу и страх из-за количества погибших
scenes.relation: Дзяньянь чувствует связь с погибшими через их истории
scenes.outcome: Дзяньянь понимает, что связь оставалась нестабильной, а температура продолжала подниматься

scenes.title: Правительство
scenes.action: Правительство объявляет об открытии новых временных убежищ и складов с продовольственными запасами
scenes.intent: Правительство хочет помочь жителям выжить в условиях жары и нехватки ресурсов
scenes.conflict: Люди должны добираться до новых убежищ самостоятельно из-за ограниченных ресурсов
scenes.state: Люди испытывают надежду и отчаяние одновременно
scenes.relation: Правительство поддерживает связь с населением через приложение VChat
scenes.outcome: Люди понимают, что правительство держит приложение VChat под контролем для обеспечения бесперебойной связи

scenes.title: Жители комплекса
scenes.action: Обсуждение конфликтов и споров в чатах жилых комплексов
scenes.intent: Люди пытаются найти решение конфликтов и споров
scenes.conflict: Конфликты и споры вспыхивают с новой силой из-за нехватки ресурсов
scenes.state: Люди испытывают напряжение и гнев из-за нехватки ресурсов
scenes.relation: Напряжённые отношения между жителями из-за нехватки ресурсов
scenes.outcome: Люди понимают, что конфликты и споры будут продолжаться до тех пор, пока не будет найдено решение

scenes.title: Jian Yan
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Underground parking of Tianshuiwan residential complex
location.description: a dark, humid, and stifling subterranean space filled with the smell of waste and human bodies

scenes.intent: Jian Yan intends to survive the catastrophe by maximizing her survival skills before the heatwave ends, knowing that the future will be more dangerous once the isolation breaks
scenes.conflict: The extreme heat and lack of resources hinder her ability to rest, while the impending return of the outside world threatens to bring chaos and competition for scarce supplies
scenes.state: Exhausted but mentally sharp, she is hyper-focused on learning and preparing for the inevitable return of the hostile outside world
scenes.outcome: She spends days training on simulators for piloting, driving, and shooting, absorbing knowledge like a sponge while ignoring entertainment to prepare for the coming storm.

scenes.title: Jian Yan
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Underground parking of Tianshuiwan residential complex

scenes.intent: She plans to endure the remaining heatwave safely, using the isolation to master essential survival skills before the temperature drops and the crowds return
scenes.conflict: The oppressive heat and the knowledge that the outside world will become dangerous again create a psychological burden as she prepares for the transition from safety to chaos
scenes.state: Determined and focused, she suppresses her fatigue to ensure she is ready for the moment the heat breaks
scenes.outcome: The heatwave begins to subside, dropping from 75 degrees to 60 degrees on the eighteenth day, signaling the end of the immediate thermal threat.

scenes.title: Jian Yan
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Underground parking of Tianshuiwan residential complex

scenes.intent: She observes the streets from her vantage point, waiting for the first signs of life returning to the surface after weeks of silence
scenes.conflict: The sudden drop in temperature and the return of the outside world introduce the risk of conflict and resource scarcity that she has been training for
scenes.state: Alert and cautious, she watches the horizon for the first movement of people and vehicles
scenes.outcome: She spots a convoy of trucks painted with heat-resistant paint arriving at the residential complex gates, marking the return of supplies and the end of the isolation.

scenes.title: Military Personnel, Civilians
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Entrance of Tianshuiwan residential complex
location.description: where armed soldiers maintain order amidst the arriving convoy

scenes.intent: The military aims to secure the delivery of supplies and manage the crowd of desperate survivors eager to exit the underground
scenes.conflict: The tension between the disciplined military order and the chaotic, desperate emotions of the starving and dehydrated civilians
scenes.state: The soldiers are serious and controlled, while the civilians are a mix of hysterical joy and desperate need
scenes.relation: The military holds the civilians in check while they unload supplies and allow people to exit
scenes.outcome: The temperature drops to 37 degrees, and the first rain begins to fall, shocking the parked cars and the waiting crowd.

scenes.title: Civilians
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: The survivors seek to escape the underground and drink the rainwater, believing it to be a sign of salvation and the end of their suffering
scenes.conflict: The overwhelming joy of the rain clashes with the reality of potential contamination and the physical danger of the environment
scenes.state: Ecstatic, hysterical, and desperate, they jump, cry, and drink the water without thinking of the consequences
scenes.relation: The crowd shares a collective moment of euphoria and relief
scenes.outcome: The heavy rain washes the dust and heat away, causing people to collapse in joy and drink the warm, muddy water greedily.

scenes.title: Unknown Voice, Civilians
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: A voice attempts to warn the crowd about the potential toxicity of the rainwater due to chemical disinfectants and ash
scenes.conflict: The warning is drowned out by the collective euphoria and dehydration of the crowd, who prioritize immediate thirst over long-term safety
scenes.state: The crowd is oblivious and desperate, ignoring the logical warnings in favor of immediate relief
scenes.relation: The warning voice stands in opposition to the celebratory mood of the crowd
scenes.outcome: The warnings about radioactive fallout, viruses, and parasites are ignored as the dehydrated people continue to drink the water and celebrate their survival.

scenes.title: Людахун
scenes.action: The crowd ignores warnings about radiation and dehydration, focusing solely on survival and drinking urine or condensation while water rationing favors the management committee.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets
location.description: flooded with rainwater, grey dust piles, and makeshift water sources

scenes.intent: Людахун wants to organize the crowd to move sandbags from the empty parking garage to building entrances to prevent flooding, knowing the drainage issues in Anming are severe.
scenes.conflict: The crowd is exhausted, indifferent to safety risks like radiation or bacteria, and resents Людахун for trying to command them after only a few days of managing food distribution.
scenes.state: Людахун is determined but faces immediate hostility; the crowd is irritated, tired, and hostile towards authority figures they perceive as incompetent or self-serving.
scenes.relation: Людахун is challenged by the crowd who distrust him due to past negligence by the management company that allowed pests to enter their homes.
scenes.outcome: The crowd rejects Людахун's request, mocking his authority and refusing to help, leaving him isolated and angry as they continue walking home.

scenes.title: Людахун
scenes.action: Людахун attempts to rally support by explaining the history of flooding in the complex and the strategic value of moving sandbags to residential entrances instead of the empty garage.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets
location.description: near the entrance to the parking garage

scenes.intent: Людахун seeks to persuade the men to help move sandbags to protect buildings from rising floodwaters caused by the heavy rain and broken drainage system.
scenes.conflict: A man in the crowd angrily questions Людахун's right to command, pointing out that he has only been in charge for a couple of days and that the workers are paid to carry loads while cleaners are absent.
scenes.state: Людахун feels frustrated and defensive as his authority is openly challenged by the weary and resentful workers.
scenes.relation: The relationship between Людахун and the workers deteriorates as the workers express their fatigue and refusal to follow orders they deem unfair.
scenes.outcome: The argument escalates with the crowd growing agitated, accusing Людахун of overstepping his bounds and threatening to hold him responsible for lightning strikes or other disasters.

scenes.title: Людахун
scenes.action: The crowd's anger peaks as they express distrust in Людахун's leadership, citing past failures where pests entered their homes due to the management company's negligence.
scenes.intent: Людахун tries to maintain order and prevent the situation from escalating further, hoping to regain some semblance of control over the situation.
scenes.conflict: The crowd's resentment boils over, with individuals refusing to help and expressing their exhaustion and hunger, making Людахун's task of organizing flood protection nearly impossible.
scenes.state: Людахун is tense and angry, clenching his fists as he internally vows that the crowd will come crawling back to him later.
scenes.relation: The crowd's distrust and hostility towards Людахун intensifies, creating a hostile environment where his leadership is actively rejected.
scenes.outcome: The crowd continues to argue and refuse to help, leaving Людахун isolated and unable to execute his plan to move the sandbags.

scenes.title: Сун Дзентао
scenes.action: Сун Дзентао steps forward from the crowd to offer help despite his fatigue, citing his military background and experience in flood relief operations.
scenes.intent: Сун Дзентао wants to demonstrate his willingness to help by moving sandbags to the building entrances, leveraging his past experience to inspire others to join him.
scenes.conflict: Сун Дзентао faces the physical challenge of his own exhaustion and weakness, as well as the social challenge of convincing others to join his effort in a hostile environment.
scenes.state: Сун Дзентао is determined and resilient, driven by a sense of duty and community spirit despite his physical limitations.
scenes.relation: Сун Дзентао's actions inspire hope and unity among the crowd, contrasting with the earlier hostility and division.
scenes.outcome: Сун Дзентао grabs two sandbags and starts carrying them to the building entrance, setting an example for others to follow.

scenes.title: Сун Дзентао
scenes.action: Сун Дзентао's wife notices his intention to help and tries to stop him out of concern for his safety, while Сун Дзентао reassures her of his ability to hold on.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets
location.description: near the entrance to the parking garage

scenes.intent: Сун Дзентао wants to reassure his wife that he can handle the situation and that they will return home together safely, while his wife wants to protect him from harm.
scenes.conflict: Сун Дзентао's determination to help clashes with his wife's concern for his well-being, creating a moment of emotional tension between them.
scenes.state: Сун Дзентао is calm and reassuring, while his wife is worried and anxious about his safety.
scenes.relation: The couple's relationship is tested by the crisis, with Сун Дзентао trying to maintain a positive outlook while his wife expresses her fears.
scenes.outcome: Сун Дзентао successfully reassures his wife and continues to carry the sandbags, demonstrating his commitment to helping his community.

scenes.title: Джан Цимин
scenes.action: Джан Цимин supports Сун Дзентао's effort to unite the community, emphasizing the importance of solidarity in the face of the crisis.

location.name: Underground shelter complex streets

scenes.intent: Джан Цимин wants to encourage unity and cooperation among the residents, using his official tone to lend weight to the call for collective action.
scenes.conflict: Джан Цимин's attempt to promote unity faces the challenge of the crowd's exhaustion and resentment, which may hinder the effectiveness of his message.
scenes.state: Джан Цимин appears worn out and official, with a beard and tired eyes, reflecting the strain of the crisis on his appearance and demeanor.
scenes.relation: Джан Цимин's support for Сун Дзентао strengthens the bond between them and reinforces the theme of community solidarity.
scenes.outcome: Джан Цимин's encouragement helps to bolster Сун Дзентао's resolve and inspires others to join the effort of moving sandbags and protecting the buildings from flooding.

scenes.state: Сун Дзентао is determined and resilient, driven by a sense of duty and community spirit despite his physical limitations.

scenes.outcome: Сун Дзентаo successfully moves the sandbags to the building entrances, setting an example for others to follow and contributing to the community's flood protection efforts.

scenes.title: Сун Дзентао
scenes.action: Сун Дзентаo's internal monologue reveals his belief that his sacrifices and contributions will eventually be rewarded, filling him with a strange sense of anticipation.

scenes.title: Dзянья Янь
scenes.action: 4-5 sentences

location.name: Apartment interior
location.description: 32nd floor, darkened room with drawn curtains and a nightlight on

scenes.intent: She observes the environment without eating, checks the thermometer, and sets up security cameras to monitor the flood situation
scenes.conflict: The temperature drop feels like cold after weeks of extreme heat, and she worries about the safety of her floor and neighbors
scenes.state: Cautious and alert, she is physically exhausted from not eating but mentally focused on survival
scenes.outcome: She confirms the water level on the first floor and sees evacuees moving toward the stairs, deciding not to open her door to them

scenes.title: Dзянья Янь
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: She checks the camera feed on the 7th floor to see if her neighbor Jiang Cici is still there
scenes.conflict: The camera shows the apartment is empty, raising questions about Cici's safety
scenes.state: Concerned and vigilant, she switches the camera to her own floor immediately after
scenes.outcome: She sees a thin, exhausted Hechunmei standing outside her door, marking the arrival of the first guest

scenes.title: Hechunmei
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: She stands at the door with a dim flashlight, asking if the girl from the neighboring apartment will return from the official shelter
scenes.conflict: Her flashlight is nearly dead, and she cannot see clearly through the wire mesh above the door; she was previously shocked by the door's electricity
scenes.state: Skeptical and slightly fearful, she recalls the danger of the electric door and the current storm
scenes.relation: She questions Dзянья Янь about the neighbor's fate, showing a mix of curiosity and suspicion
scenes.outcome: Dзянья Янь's husband opens the door to let her in, interrupting her questioning

scenes.title: Jiao Guangufu
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: He opens the door to let his wife and daughter in, then responds to her question about the neighbor
scenes.conflict: He is tired after 20 days without sleep and frustrated by his wife's obsession with the neighbor's return
scenes.state: Irritated and weary, he feels the need to protect his family from further stress
scenes.relation: He defends his decision to let the neighbor back in, contrasting with his wife's desire for a spectacle
scenes.outcome: He explains that the neighbor will likely return due to the storm and the flooded shelters, dismissing his wife's desire for a show

scenes.title: Hechunmei
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: She argues that the neighbor will return to face retribution from other residents
scenes.conflict: Her husband is tired and wants to avoid conflict, while she is eager for a dramatic confrontation
scenes.state: Zestful and vindictive, she believes the neighbor deserves punishment for leaving the stairwell door unlocked
scenes.relation: She mocks her husband's fatigue and insists on the neighbor's inevitable downfall
scenes.outcome: She reveals that the neighbor's actions caused deaths in the building and that other residents are planning revenge

scenes.title: Jiao Guangufu
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: He tries to calm his wife down, reminding her of their own struggles and the deaths of his parents
scenes.conflict: He is overwhelmed by grief and exhaustion, while she remains focused on the neighbor's fate
scenes.state: Resigned and angry, he decides to stop tolerating her behavior after losing his parents to heatstroke and stroke
scenes.relation: He sets a boundary, telling her to stop bringing up the past and to consider their own problems
scenes.outcome: He walks into the apartment, slamming the door, leaving her confused and shocked

scenes.title: Hechunmei
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: She stands in disbelief, wondering if her husband has ever yelled at her before
scenes.conflict: She is stunned by his outburst and unsure how to react
scenes.state: Confused and hurt, she processes the sudden change in his behavior
scenes.outcome: She remains standing, lost in thought, as footsteps approach from the stairwell

scenes.title: Sui, Dingtao, Sudai
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Stairwell entrance to Dзянья Янь's apartment

scenes.intent: They appear soaked from the rain, looking like wet chickens, and Hechunmei reacts with sarcasm
scenes.conflict: Hechunmei feels humiliated by their presence and mocks their "romantic walk in the rain"
scenes.state: Mocking and bitter, she recalls a recent humiliation and uses it to justify her attitude
scenes.relation: She addresses them with disdain, highlighting the contrast between their wet appearance and her dry, safe position
scenes.outcome: She delivers a sarcastic comment about their behavior, setting the stage for further tension

scenes.title: Хэтчун Мей
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Дождливая улица перед квартирой
location.description: где двое мужчин выглядят как мокрые курицы

scenes.intent: Хэтчун Мей хочет унизить Суня и Судая за их романтическую прогулку под дождём, но её попытка проваливается
scenes.conflict: Сунь Дзентао игнорирует её насмешки и берёт Судай за руку, показывая полное равнодушие к её словам
scenes.state: Раздражённая и униженная, она осознаёт, что её попытки уколоть других не работают
scenes.relation: Отношения между Хэтчун Мей и парой напряжены из-за её попыток унизить их
scenes.outcome: Сунь и Судай уходят вместе, оставляя Хэтчун Мей в глупом положении, что заставляет её раздражённо толкнуть дверь и войти в квартиру

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: Дзян Янь хочет разобраться с Джан Цицы, которая подготовила для неё тёплый приём, но решает подождать, пока всё придёт само
scenes.conflict: Её желудок заурчал, напоминая о голоде, что отвлекает её от мыслей о Джан Цицы
scenes.state: Удовлетворённая перспективой ждать, но физически голодная, она усмехается и решает отложить конфликт

outfits.Дзян Янь: лёгкая шёлковая накидка, которую она достала из шкафа

scenes.relation: Дзян Янь чувствует себя уверенно, зная, что сможет справиться с Джан Цицы позже
scenes.outcome: Дзян Янь начинает есть ужин, наслаждаясь вкусом и впервые за долгое время чувствуя удовлетворение

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Квартира Дзян Янь
location.description: где она готовится к вечернему перерыву

scenes.intent: Дзян Янь хочет посвятить вечер проверке своих навыков в сельском хозяйстве, используя пустующий чернозёмный участок
scenes.conflict: Её внимание отвлекает мысль о необходимости применять теоретические знания на практике, несмотря на избыток свежих овощей и фруктов
scenes.state: Сосредоточенная и мотивированная, она решает начать работу с семенами
scenes.relation: Дзян Янь взаимодействует с семенами, планируя их посадку
scenes.outcome: Дзян Янь замачивает семена лука парей в воде, следуя рекомендациям из обучающего видео, и планирует пересадку через 2-3 дня

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Чернозёмный участок земли возле яблочного отсека

scenes.intent: Дзян Янь хочет разделить участок на зоны (фруктовую, цветочную, овощную, лекарственных трав) для улучшения эстетики и упрощения ухода
scenes.conflict: Её внимание отвлекает мысль о необходимости использовать запасённую водопроводную воду с добавлением питательных веществ, что не является идеальным решением
scenes.state: Задумчивая и ищущая решение проблемы с водой, она анализирует свойства почвы
scenes.relation: Дзян Янь взаимодействует с почвой и водой, планируя будущие посадки
scenes.outcome: Дзян Янь замачивает семена шиповника в воде и планирует высадку кустов по периметру участка через 2 дня

scenes.title: Дзян Янь
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Граница между белой жилой зоной и чёрной зоной посадок

scenes.intent: Дзян Янь хочет найти источник воды, который она слышит, чтобы решить проблему с уплотнением грунта
scenes.conflict: Источник воды остаётся невидимым, несмотря на то, что шум доносился с границы между зонами
scenes.state: Запутанная и ищущая решение, она задумывается о том, как сделать источник видимым и рассеять белый туман
scenes.relation: Дзян Янь взаимодействует с пространством, пытаясь понять его тайны
scenes.outcome: Дзян Янь решает перечитать постапокалиптические романы, чтобы найти намёк на разгадку, и продолжает планировать будущие действия

scenes.title: Dziań Yan
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Vegetable storage area
location.description: a room containing shelves with seeds and water containers

scenes.intent: She intends to replant vegetables and prepare rose bushes to create a living hedge around the black soil plot, aiming to beautify the garden and fill the air with fragrance
scenes.conflict: She must manage limited space and time, deciding to wait for current plants to sprout before expanding further
scenes.state: She feels satisfied and peaceful, viewing gardening as a relaxing activity despite the physical strain on her back and legs
scenes.outcome: She finishes planting vegetables, roses, peonies, tulips, and other flowers in a flower bed occupying slightly more than a third of a basketball court

scenes.title: Dziań Yan
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: She plans to clean up after gardening, take a shower, and spend the night in the real world to maintain her connection with the outside environment
scenes.conflict: The heavy rain and thunderstorm outside threaten to disrupt her sleep and safety, yet she chooses to stay indoors
scenes.state: She feels tired but determined, preparing for a sleepless night caused by the storm and the presence of intruders
scenes.outcome: She takes a shower, dries her hair, sits by the pool, and eventually goes to bed with her security systems activated

scenes.title: Dziań Yan
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Bedroom window
location.description: courtyard of residential complex Block A

scenes.intent: She wants to observe the situation outside and identify the mysterious figures moving in the darkness toward the tallest building
scenes.conflict: The heavy rain and lightning make it difficult to see clearly, but her enhanced senses allow her to detect the intruders
scenes.state: She becomes alert and concerned, realizing that the organized group of intruders poses a threat to the building's security
scenes.outcome: She confirms that the door to Block A has been breached and that intruders are carrying luggage toward the stairs

scenes.title: Dziań Yan
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

location.name: Window of residential complex Block A

scenes.intent: She aims to assess the extent of the intrusion and determine the number of people who have entered the building
scenes.conflict: The lack of noise and the absence of visible intruders in the corridors suggest they are hiding or moving stealthily, complicating her assessment
scenes.state: She feels uneasy and suspicious, wondering how so many people can enter without making a commotion
scenes.outcome: She switches to cameras on the 20th and 7th floors and finds the corridors empty, realizing the intruders are likely hiding in the corridors

scenes.title: Dziań Yan
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: She decides to activate her defense systems and prepare for potential attacks, ensuring the building's safety
scenes.conflict: The worsening weather and the presence of unknown intruders increase the risk of resource shortages and security breaches
scenes.state: She feels vigilant and ready, though tired, as she prepares to face the challenges ahead
scenes.outcome: She sets the voltage of her anti-hacking system to 500 V and settles into her warm, soft blanket, ready to sleep despite the looming threats

scenes.title: Dзяньян
scenes.action: Dзяньян struggles with sleepiness and decides to activate her security systems before resting.

location.name: Dзяньян's apartment
location.description: a well-insulated room with a warm, soft blanket and a monitor displaying the building's status.

scenes.intent: Dзяньян wants to secure her apartment against hacking and ensure her safety before sleeping through the storm.
scenes.conflict: Sleepiness and the overwhelming noise of thunder and lightning hinder her ability to rest comfortably.
scenes.state: Dзяньян feels tired but determined to prepare for the worsening situation.
scenes.outcome: Dзяньян successfully activates the anti-hacking system at 500V and settles into her blanket to sleep.

scenes.title: Dзяньян
scenes.action: Dзяньян wakes up naturally and observes the severe weather conditions outside her window.

location.name: Dзяньян's apartment
location.description: near the window overlooking the flooded street.

scenes.intent: Dзяньян wants to assess the current state of the flood and the behavior of other residents.
scenes.conflict: The heavy rain and darkness outside create a sense of impending doom and isolation.
scenes.state: Dзяньян feels relaxed initially but becomes concerned as she sees the rising water levels.
scenes.outcome: Dзяньян sees that the water has risen to the third floor and that neighbors on higher floors are preparing for evacuation.

scenes.title: Dзяньян
scenes.action: Dзяньян analyzes the supply crisis and the limitations of government aid during the disaster.
scenes.intent: Dзяньян wants to understand the true threats facing her, which are food, water, and medicine shortages.
scenes.conflict: Spoiled food, contaminated water, and lack of medicine pose serious health risks that she must manage alone.
scenes.state: Dзяньян feels anxious about the lack of resources but remains pragmatic about the situation.
scenes.outcome: Dзяньян concludes that she cannot rely on government help and must act independently to survive.

scenes.title: Dзяньян
scenes.action: Dзяньян observes the growing tension in the building as people move around and smoke appears in the hallway.

location.name: Dзяньян's apartment
location.description: looking through the monitor at the building's corridors

scenes.intent: Dзяньян wants to avoid conflict and stay safe while others search for food and medicine.
scenes.conflict: The presence of intruders, smoke from burning furniture, and the smell of cooking food create a chaotic and dangerous environment.
scenes.state: Dзяньян feels cautious and decides to stay inside her apartment despite the temptation to leave.
scenes.outcome: Dзяньян decides to wait out the storm and avoid confrontation with the intruders.

scenes.title: Dзяньян
scenes.action: Dзяньян focuses on her personal space and cultivates plants as a way to cope with the crisis.
scenes.intent: Dзяньян wants to maintain a sense of normalcy and productivity by tending to her plants.
scenes.conflict: The harsh weather conditions make it difficult to find animals or new plants to care for.
scenes.state: Dзяньян feels content and hopeful as she sees her plants growing, but also aware of the limitations.
scenes.outcome: Dзяньян successfully tends to her garlic and rose plants and plans to look for animals once the rain stops.

scenes.title: Dзяньян
scenes.action: Dзяньян hears strange sounds on her monitor and prepares to investigate the situation on the 20th floor.
scenes.intent: Dзяньян wants to identify the source of the strange sounds and ensure her safety.
scenes.conflict: The sounds could indicate danger or an opportunity, creating uncertainty about what to do next.
scenes.state: Dзяньян feels alert and ready to act, having grabbed her tablet to investigate.
scenes.outcome: Dзяньян sees something unexpected on the 20th-floor screen and prepares to respond to the new development.

scenes.title: Dзяньян

location.name: Apartment building corridor
location.description: 20th floor, filled with refugees and makeshift beds

scenes.intent: Dзяньян waits for the rain to stop to search for survivors, then investigates strange sounds on the monitor showing the 20th floor
scenes.conflict: The screen reveals a crowded corridor with a violent conflict breaking out among refugees

scenes.relation: The voice is recognized by Dзяньян as a potential ally

scenes.title: Люда Ахун, Джан Цицы, Джан Цимин, guards
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: They approach the group, revealing themselves as the former controllers of resources and power

scenes.title: Люда Ахун, Джан Цимин
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: They explain their past role in managing resources and controlling the building
scenes.conflict: They reveal that their true nature became apparent when the heat peaked, leading to manipulation and threats
scenes.state: They appear as saviors who now control the situation
scenes.relation: They are seen as powerful figures who previously helped the weak but now exploit the situation
scenes.outcome: The refugees feel anxiety and recognize the danger of relying on them

scenes.title: Гаожуан (High man)
scenes.action: 3-5 sentences

scenes.relation: He is the one being addressed by the group and the new arrivals
scenes.outcome: He changes the topic to avoid admitting that his lower apartments also have supplies, fearing it will cause unrest

scenes.action: 3-5 sentences
scenes.intent: He considers suggesting a move to the 32nd floor but decides against it
scenes.conflict: He knows that many people are suffering from food and medicine shortages, and he cannot risk admitting he has supplies
scenes.state: Cautious and strategic, trying to maintain order
scenes.relation: He is the one being addressed by Джан Цица and the group
scenes.outcome: He changes the topic and warns that the water is already reaching the 10th floor and the rain is intensifying

scenes.title: Gaodaju, Jian CiCi, Jian Yan
scenes.action: Gaodaju and Jian CiCi discuss the rising floodwaters and the strategic advantage of the 32nd floor, while Gaodaju hesitates about killing living owners but ultimately agrees to seize the opportunity before others do.

location.name: 32nd floor corridor
location.description: dark and wet with rising floodwaters reaching the 10th floor

scenes.intent: Jian CiCi wants to seize the 32nd floor legally to defend against others, while Gaodaju wants to join the plan but is conflicted about violence
scenes.conflict: Gaodaju is unsure about killing owners and the morality of the plan, while the rising flood threatens their current position
scenes.state: Gaodaju is conflicted and thoughtful, Jian CiCi is determined and hateful towards the opposition
scenes.relation: Jian CiCi persuades Gaodaju to join the plan, Gaodaju agrees after reflection
scenes.outcome: Gaodaju decides to join the plan and they prepare to move to the elevator

scenes.title: Gaodaju, Jian CiCi, other residents
scenes.action: Other residents in the corridors consider moving to higher floors, and Gaodaju realizes they are armed and serious about causing chaos to seize apartments.
scenes.intent: Other residents want to move to higher floors for safety, while Gaodaju wants to understand their true intentions
scenes.conflict: Gaodaju fears the armed group is there to cause chaos and seize apartments, not just for safety
scenes.state: Gaodaju is cautious and analytical, other residents are determined and armed
props: Weapons mentioned for the armed group
scenes.relation: Gaodaju realizes the armed group is targeting 3201 apartment and Jian Yan specifically
scenes.outcome: Gaodaju decides to accept the offer to join the plan despite his concerns

scenes.title: Gaodaju, Jian CiCi, Jian Danian, Ludahun
scenes.action: Jian Danian and Ludahun discuss sharing the opportunity, and Jian CiCi proposes taking two apartments while giving others the right to use corridors and elevators for defense.
scenes.intent: Jian CiCi wants to share the opportunity with others, while Ludahun wants to join the plan
scenes.conflict: Ludahun is hesitant and questions the fairness of sharing, while Jian CiCi insists on sharing the opportunity
scenes.state: Jian CiCi is generous and strategic, Ludahun is cautious and questioning
scenes.relation: Jian CiCi persuades Ludahun to join the plan, Ludahun agrees after some hesitation
scenes.outcome: Gaodaju confirms the plan and they all head towards the elevator

scenes.title: Gaodaju, Jian CiCi, Ludahun, young man
scenes.action: Ludahun and the young man discuss sharing food and water with the elderly residents, but the young man refuses and mocks their weakness.
scenes.intent: Ludahun wants to share food and water with the elderly, while the young man refuses and mocks them
scenes.conflict: The young man refuses to share food and water, mocking the elderly for their weakness
scenes.state: Ludahun is generous and compassionate, the young man is cold and mocking
scenes.relation: The young man's refusal creates tension between the groups
scenes.outcome: Ludahun decides to leave with the armed group, leaving the elderly behind

scenes.title: Jian Yan
scenes.action: Jian Yan observes the group leaving via the elevator and decides to prepare for the upcoming conflict by equipping herself with weapons and armor.
scenes.intent: Jian Yan wants to prepare for the upcoming conflict and protect herself
scenes.conflict: Jian Yan must choose between using powerful weapons that could harm her own people or using less powerful ones
scenes.state: Jian Yan is calm and determined, focused on the upcoming conflict
scenes.outcome: Jian Yan prepares for the upcoming conflict and decides not to use powerful weapons that could harm her own people

scenes.action: Jian Yan considers using powerful weapons like machine guns and bombs but decides against it to avoid harming her own people.
scenes.intent: Jian Yan wants to use powerful weapons to defend herself but is concerned about harming her own people
scenes.conflict: Jian Yan must choose between using powerful weapons that could harm her own people or using less powerful ones
scenes.state: Jian Yan is cautious and strategic, focused on protecting her own people
scenes.outcome: Jian Yan decides not to use powerful weapons and prepares for the upcoming conflict with less powerful weapons

scenes.title: Jian Yan
scenes.action: Jian Yan decides not to use powerful weapons and prepares for the upcoming conflict with less powerful weapons.
scenes.intent: Jian Yan wants to use less powerful weapons to defend herself without harming her own people
scenes.conflict: Jian Yan must choose between using powerful weapons that could harm her own people or using less powerful ones
scenes.state: Jian Yan is cautious and strategic, focused on protecting her own people
scenes.outcome: Jian Yan prepares for the upcoming conflict with less powerful weapons and decides not to use powerful weapons that could harm her own people

scenes.title: Dзян Янь
scenes.action: Dзян Янь prepares for combat by donning protective gear in a dimly lit corridor despite the daylight outside.

location.name: Corridor of a building
location.description: dark interior contrasting with daylight outside, leading to the 32nd floor

scenes.intent: Dзян Янь intends to infiltrate the 32nd floor to target a specific enemy named Джанцицы while observing other groups' movements.
scenes.conflict: The darkness inside the corridor and the need to maintain stealth while wearing heavy special forces equipment create tension.
scenes.state: Dзян Янь feels confident and prepared, believing her gear makes her look like a member of the Repals Bay special forces unit.

outfits.Dзян Янь: black mask with a skull design, protective gear; no other clothing details mentioned

scenes.relation: Dзян Янь is alone in her preparation, observing the situation from a distance
scenes.outcome: She confirms the external door's anti-hacking system is set to 500V high voltage before exiting the room.

scenes.title: Лю Дахун
scenes.action: Лю Дахун leads a group of people up to the 32nd floor, pausing at the entrance to assess the situation.

location.name: Entrance to the 32nd floor
location.description: clean environment compared to lower floors

scenes.intent: The group aims to secure the 32nd floor, leaving the women and children temporarily on the 31st floor under his protection.
scenes.conflict: Heavy rain and thunder outside, plus the unknown threat level of the 32nd floor inhabitants, hinder their immediate entry.
scenes.state: Лю Дахун is calm and authoritative, signaling the group to stop and wait for further orders.
props: None specifically mentioned for this scene
scenes.relation: Лю Дахун leads the group, making decisions on their approach to the floor
scenes.outcome: The group halts at the entrance, noting the cleanliness of the 32nd floor and the closed doors of some residents.

scenes.title: Гауда Джуан
scenes.action: Гауда Джуан consults with the group about which family to target first on the 32nd floor.
scenes.intent: Гауда Джуан seeks to identify the first target for attack among the four families on the floor.
scenes.conflict: Lack of knowledge about the specific situation on the 32nd floor and a dead mobile phone battery preventing room number checks hinder their decision.
scenes.state: Гауда Джуан is uncertain and relies on others for information, while the man in the pot is eager to act.
scenes.relation: Гауда Джуан asks questions, while Джан Цицы provides information about the eccentric resident in 3201
scenes.outcome: They decide to start with house 3201, suspecting the resident might have returned from an official shelter.

scenes.title: Джан Цицы
scenes.action: Джан Цицы reveals her plan to attack house 3201 and mocks the potential victim's fate.
scenes.intent: Джан Цицы intends to attack house 3201 immediately, using the excuse of a legal reason for the assault.
scenes.conflict: The uncertainty of whether the resident has returned from the shelter and the potential danger of the storm.
scenes.state: Джан Цицы is confident and somewhat sadistic, planning to make the victim's life worse than death if they return.
scenes.relation: Джан Цицы speaks to Гауда Джуан, sharing her plans and mocking the situation
scenes.outcome: She jokes about the evening's entertainment and threatens the resident's future if they return.

scenes.title: Человек в горшке
scenes.action: The man in the pot urges the group to knock on the door, ignoring the electrical danger.
scenes.intent: The man in the pot wants to knock on the door immediately to confront the resident.
scenes.conflict: Джанмин warns against knocking due to the storm and the risk of electric shock, causing confusion among the group.
scenes.state: The man in the pot is impulsive and dismissive of the electrical danger, while Джанмин is cautious and fearful.
scenes.relation: The man in the pot confronts Джанмин, calling him a fool for worrying about electricity
scenes.outcome: The group remains hesitant, with the man in the pot expressing his frustration over the lack of electricity.

scenes.title: Джанмин
scenes.action: Джанмин explains the electrical danger and the group's reliance on electricity for survival.
scenes.intent: Джанмин aims to prevent the group from knocking on the door to avoid an electric shock.
scenes.conflict: The group's desperation for electricity and the man in the pot's impatience clash with the need for caution.
scenes.state: Джанмин is fearful and knowledgeable about the electrical dangers, while the others are desperate for power.
scenes.relation: Джанмин warns the group, while the man in the pot mocks his caution
scenes.outcome: The group acknowledges the importance of electricity, with the man in the pot admitting his own lack of power.

scenes.title: Лю Дахун
scenes.action: Лю Дахун interrupts the argument and shares information about a red envelope received from a decoration company.
scenes.intent: Лю Дахун intends to send a young man to check the situation before proceeding with the attack.
scenes.conflict: The group's uncertainty about the resident's status and the potential for violence.
scenes.state: Лю Дахун is calm and decisive, using his connections to gather information and prepare for the attack.
scenes.relation: Лю Дахун leads the group, making decisions based on the information he has gathered
scenes.outcome: The group is surprised by Лю Дахун's revelation, and he prepares to send a young man to investigate.

scenes.title: Молодой человек
scenes.action: The young man, equipped with tools, prepares to enter house 3201 despite the storm.
scenes.intent: The young man intends to enter house 3201 to check the situation and possibly repair or damage the door.
scenes.conflict: The storm and the risk of electric shock hinder his entry, but he is determined to proceed.
scenes.state: The young man is cautious but willing to take risks, following Лю Дахун's orders.
scenes.relation: The young man follows Лю Дахун's instructions, showing respect for his authority
scenes.outcome: The young man walks towards the door, ready to face the challenges ahead.

scenes.title: Люда Хун, Люжуй, Гау Дажуан
scenes.action: Люда Хун отдает приказ Люжуи проверить дверь, предупреждая о грозе и молниях. Молодой человек в утепленной обуви и перчатках несет большой ящик с инструментами и подходит к двери. Люда Хун объясняет Гау Дажуану, что они подготовились к этой ситуации, и упоминает, что Люжуй уже достиг точки 3.201.

scenes.conflict: Сильная гроза, гром и молния создают опасные условия, а высокое напряжение на двери требует осторожности и специальных мер предосторожности

scenes.outcome: Люжуй раскладывает изолирующий коврик на двери и готовит тестер, но раздается резкий звонок, заставляя его отступить в страхе

scenes.title: Люжуй, Люда Хун, Гау Дажуан

Люда Хун рассматривает возможность использования разряженной глушилки или разбивания окна на крыше, но Гау Дажуан возражает, сравнивая это с продажей тофу по цене мяса.

scenes.conflict: Высокое напряжение на двери и гроза создают угрозу, а предложение разбить окно или использовать глушилку вызывает споры между персонажами
scenes.state: Люжуй напуган, Люда Хун рассудителен и ищет решения, Гау Дажуан скептически настроен и сомневается в целесообразности действий

scenes.outcome: Люда Хун объясняет, что с электричеством можно сделать многое, и предлагает использовать электрические дубинки, но Гау Дажуан продолжает сомневаться

scenes.title: Люда Хун, Гау Дажуан, Люжуй
scenes.action: Люда Хун шутит о том, что если он выйдет на улицу, его может ударить молния, и он станет нежным внутри. Все смеются над его шуткой, и Люжуй снова предупреждает о необходимости не выходить на улицу, даже если привязать веревку к крыше. Джан Циц указывает на номер 3202, который, похоже, использовался в качестве оплаты за строительный проект.

scenes.title: Люда Хун, Гау Дажуан, Люжуй, Джан Циц, Хэтчунмей
scenes.action: Сотрудники управления недвижимостью поднимаются наверх и стучат в дверь, требуя открыть. Хэтчунмей из соседнего дома 203 открывает дверь и высунула голову, наблюдая за происходящим. Она спрашивает, что привело менеджера Лю и его братьев на тридцать второй этаж, и выражает удивление их появлению.

scenes.relation: Хэтчунмей наблюдает за происходящим, сотрудники управления недвижимостью настаивают на открытии двери, Люда Хун и его команда наблюдают за ситуацией

location.name: За дверью дома

scenes.intent: Люжуй хочет присоединиться к команде для атаки, чтобы выслужиться перед Людахуном, используя имеющиеся ресурсы и рабочую силу
scenes.conflict: Люжуй скрывается за глазком, но затем открывает дверь, несмотря на просьбы Люда Хуна не входить, что приводит к конфликту с Джан Цици
scenes.state: Люжуй чувствует страх, но затем решимость, Чоугуанфу ошеломлён, Джан Цици кокетлива и уверенна

scenes.intent: Люжуй хочет отомстить Джан Цици за её поведение и флирт с мужем
scenes.conflict: Люжуй не может устоять на ногах и её останавливают, Джан Цици смеётся над её попыткой ударить

scenes.relation: Люжуй и Джан Цици враждуют, Джан Цимин и сотрудник службы управления недвижимостью поддерживают Джан Цици
scenes.outcome: Люжуй не может ударить Джан Цици, Джан Цици смеётся над её попыткой

scenes.intent: Чоугуанфу хочет защитить семью и противостоять агрессии Джан Цици

scenes.title: Люжуй
